input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.5.4
            TITLE: the temperature sensor used must be in direct contact with one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.5.4: The temperature sensor used must be in direct contact with one of:
EV.7.5.4 The temperature sensor used must be in direct contact with one of:  
• The negative terminal itself  
• The negative terminal busbar less than 10 mm away from the cell terminal

final_answer: The temperature sensor used must be in direct contact with one of: • The negative terminal itself • The negative terminal busbar less than 10 mm away from the cell terminal
